turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#cfe9ff"/>
      <stop offset="0.55" stop-color="#a9d3ff"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#77b6ff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="glow" cx="50%" cy="32%" r="35%">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fff2a8" stop-opacity="0.95"/>
      <stop offset="0.35" stop-color="#ffe066" stop-opacity="0.55"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffd000" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="water" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#1c8ad6"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#0a4d87"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#sky)"/>

  <!-- Sun glow and rays -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="170" r="140" fill="url(#glow)"/>
  <g stroke="#ffd45a" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.55">
    <path d="M256 40 L256 95"/>
    <path d="M256 245 L256 300"/>
    <path d="M116 170 L168 170"/>
    <path d="M344 170 L396 170"/>
    <path d="M150 115 L186 151"/>
    <path d="M322 189 L358 225"/>
    <path d="M186 151 L150 115"/>
    <path d="M358 225 L322 189"/>
    <path d="M176 92 L206 132"/>
    <path d="M306 208 L336 248"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Clouds -->
  <g fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.85">
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="140" rx="75" ry="35"/>
    <ellipse cx="165" cy="125" rx="55" ry="28"/>
    <ellipse cx="95" cy="135" rx="45" ry="22"/>

    <ellipse cx="365" cy="125" rx="70" ry="32"/>
    <ellipse cx="410" cy="120" rx="50" ry="24"/>
    <ellipse cx="340" cy="135" rx="45" ry="22"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Water -->
  <path d="M0 330 C70 310, 140 350, 210 330 C280 305, 330 365, 400 340 C445 325, 485 330, 512 320 L512 512 L0 512 Z" fill="url(#water)" opacity="0.95"/>
  <g fill="none" stroke="#b9f0ff" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.7">
    <path d="M0 360 C70 340, 140 390, 210 370 C280 350, 330 410, 400 385 C445 370, 485 375, 512 365"/>
    <path d="M0 405 C70 385, 140 435, 210 415 C280 395, 330 455, 400 430 C445 415, 485 420, 512 410"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Hands reaching upward -->
  <g fill="#2b2b2b" opacity="0.9">
    <!-- left arm -->
    <path d="M150 420 C160 385, 175 360, 200 350 C215 345, 225 355, 220 372 C212 405, 205 415, 192 438 C178 463, 140 465, 150 420 Z"/>
    <!-- left hand -->
    <path d="M185 445 C195 430, 210 425, 230 430 C245 434, 244 456, 226 468 C205 482, 170 472, 185 445 Z"/>

    <!-- right arm -->
    <path d="M362 420 C352 385, 337 360, 312 350 C297 345, 287 355, 292 372 C300 405, 307 415, 320 438 C334 463, 372 465, 362 420 Z"/>
    <!-- right hand -->
    <path d="M327 445 C317 430, 302 425, 282 430 C267 434, 268 456, 286 468 C307 482, 342 472, 327 445 Z"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Cross (salvation) -->
  <g transform="translate(0,0)">
    <rect x="238" y="140" width="36" height="250" rx="10" fill="#f7f7f7"/>
    <rect x="168" y="225" width="176" height="36" rx="10" fill="#f7f7f7"/>
    <!-- subtle shading -->
    <rect x="246" y="150" width="20" height="230" rx="10" fill="#e7e7e7" opacity="0.9"/>
    <rect x="176" y="233" width="160" height="20" rx="10" fill="#e7e7e7" opacity="0.9"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Light rays from cross -->
  <g stroke="#ffe68a" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.5">
    <path d="M256 100 L256 150"/>
    <path d="M230 110 L220 155"/>
    <path d="M282 110 L292 155"/>
    <path d="M200 135 L188 170"/>
    <path d="M312 135 L324 170"/>
  </g>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning:
**Visualizing salvation imagery**

I'm trying to create the word "salvation" visually without using text. Initially, I'm considering symbols like hands reaching up with a cross, or combining a heart with a lifebuoy. A glowing cross in clouds could suggest rescue, along with a lifebuoy or a boat. Eventually, I think I could have waves in the foreground, a stylized boat, and a central cross with rays, topped with hands reaching upwards for a more profound visual representation.**Crafting a salvation design**

I'm planning to draw two silhouetted hands reaching up toward a cross, which conveys the idea of salvation. I aim to create a 512x512 viewbox and begin with a gradient background. A sun will sit behind the cross, with rays extending outward. For the cross, I’ll use vertical and horizontal rectangles with rounded ends. The hands can be made with simple shapes like circles and rectangles, plus some small clouds. I’ll ensure there are no text nodes, just shapes.

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
